nasb.text: Now after John had been taken into custody, Jesus came into Galilee, preaching the gospel of God,

esv.text: Now after John was arrested, Jesus came into Galilee, proclaiming the gospel of God,

cnv.text: 約翰被捕以後，耶穌來到加利利，宣講　神的福音，

ccb.text: 约翰被捕后，耶稣来到加利利宣讲上帝的福音，说：

csbs.text: 约翰被逮捕以后，耶稣来到加利利，传神的福音，
